🏛️ Salford 100 | Day 22 | 1946

洪水之城——伊維爾河的憤怒
City Under Water — The Fury of the River Irwell

戰爭剛結束，Salford 人以為最壞的日子已經過去。但 1946 年 9 月，伊維爾河（River Irwell）在短短 12 小時內降下超過兩吋暴雨，決堤氾濫，70 年來最嚴重的洪水席捲全城。超過 5,300 個家庭 被洪水淹浸，Lower Broughton 一帶街道積水三呎。街坊手牽手排成一列，涉水購買日用品；孩子們手扶手，互相攙扶過街回家。

The war had barely ended when Salford was struck again. In September 1946, over two inches of rain fell in just 12 hours, causing the River Irwell to burst its banks — the worst flooding in 70 years. Over 5,300 families were affected. In Lower Broughton, streets were flooded three feet deep. Neighbours formed human chains to collect daily essentials; children held hands to cross the road home.

洪水無情，人情更暖。
When the flood came, the community held firm.

#Salford100 #Salford #HongKongers #History #1946Floods

🏛️ Salford 100 Year | Day 21 | 1945

VE Day — 勝利日
Victory Day — The War is Over
戰爭結束了。

1945年德國正式投降，歐洲戰場劃上句號。Salford 的街道，那一天變成了歡樂的海洋——家家戶戶掛起 Union Jack，長桌擺上街心，鄰里共飲，孩子歡呼，老人抹淚。

但慶典背後，是現實的迫切。六年戰爭令 Salford 超過 4,000 棟房屋受損或摧毀，數萬家庭無瓦遮頭。英國政府緊急推行「預製屋計劃」（Prefab Housing Programme）——以鋁製預製板件快速組建臨時住宅，目標在全國建造 160,000 個單位。

On 8 May 1945, Germany's unconditional surrender brought the European war to an end. Six years of war had damaged or destroyed over 4,000 homes in Salford alone. The British government launched an emergency Prefab Housing Programme — lightweight aluminium prefabricated units designed for rapid assembly on cleared bomb sites.

Victory was not the end. It was the beginning of rebuilding.

#Salford100 #Salford #History #PrefabHomes #CommunitySpirit

🏛️ Salford 100 | Day 20 | 1944

從天而降的悲劇
When War Fell From the Sky

1944年7月30日，下午三時許。Pendlebury 的街道上，孩子們在玩耍，家庭主婦剛從配給站回來——直到天空傳來一聲巨響。英國皇家空軍第106中隊的 Lancaster 轟炸機 PB304，剛完成諾曼底上空的任務，引擎突然失靈。機長試圖迫降 Littleton Road 球場，但飛機失控，重重地砸入 Regatta Street 一帶的排屋之間。七名機組人員無一生還。兩名平民遇難，近八十人受傷。

On 30 July 1944, RAF 106 Squadron Lancaster PB304 returned from a mission over Normandy when its engines failed. It crashed into Regatta Street, Pendlebury — killing all seven crew members and two civilians, injuring nearly eighty. A memorial plaque still stands in Pendlebury today.

#Salford100 #Salford #History #nowar #WW2History

🏛️ Salford 100 | Day 19 | 1943年

Buile Hill Park 的鐵欄去咗邊？
Where Did Buile Hill Park's Railings Go?

1943年，Buile Hill Park 沿 Eccles Old Road 的維多利亞時代鑄鐵欄杆，根據《1939年國防法規》第50B條被政府強制徵用，全部拆除熔煉。補償以每噸25先令計算——一對造價£35的精鑄大閘，只換來 3先令9便士。

The stone bases along Eccles Old Road still stand today. The railings never came back.

#Salford100 #SalfordHistory #BuileHillPark #WartimeBritain #HomeFront

🏛️ Salford 100 Year | Day 18 | 1942年

1942年，戰爭仍未終結，Salford 的街道在黑暗中靜默守候。ARP 義務民防員身穿藍色工裝、頭戴鋼盔，在漆黑夜裡逐家巡邏，提醒居民熄燈遮光。Ordsall 的小巷、Trafford Road 的哨所，都是他們的崗位。這些普通人，用平凡的堅守，守護了整座城市。

In 1942, Salford's ARP wardens patrolled blacked-out streets through the night — steel helmets on, gas masks at the ready. These ordinary men and women formed the city's quiet shield against the darkness of war.

#Salford #History #Salford100 #Hongkongers #WWII

🏛️ Salford 100 Year | Day 17 | 1941

德軍空襲席捲英格蘭北部，Salford在隆隆炸彈聲中燃起熊熊火光。街坊鄰里在防空警報響起時互相扶持，ARP民防義工冒著砲火守護每一條街道。即使家園化為瓦礫，Salford人從未低頭，那份不屈的韌力，刻進了這座城市的靈魂深處。

In 1941, the German Blitz brought fire and destruction to the streets of Salford, as bombs fell through the night sky. ARP wardens and ordinary residents stood together, sheltering neighbours and guiding families to safety amid the rubble and flames.

#Salford #History #Salford100 #Hongkongers #TheBlitz

Salford 100 Years - Day 16: 1941年

戰時工廠生產高峰 / Wartime Factory Production

1941年，索爾福德的工廠進入24小時生產模式，為戰爭努力貢獻力量。數千名女性進入軍工廠，操作重型機械，生產炮彈、飛機零件和軍事裝備。她們戴著頭巾、穿著工作服，填補了男性參軍留下的空缺。

In 1941, Salford's factories entered 24-hour production mode. Thousands of women entered munitions factories, operating heavy machinery to produce shells, aircraft parts, and military equipment. Their contribution was vital to Allied victory.

#Salford #Salford100 #Salfordhistory #hongkongers #WomenInWar

Salford 100 Years - Day 15: 1940年

曼徹斯特大轟炸 / The Manchester Blitz

1940年12月22-24日，德國空軍對曼徹斯特和索爾福德發動猛烈轟炸。Ordsall 地區的排屋被炸毀，索爾福德碼頭燃起沖天大火。兩天內，超過200人喪生，數千人無家可歸。然而，索爾福德人展現出驚人的韌性：鄰居互相幫助搶救物品，社區在廢墟中重建生活。

On December 22-24, 1940, the German Luftwaffe launched fierce bombardment on Manchester and Salford. Over 200 people died, thousands were left homeless. Though the bombing destroyed buildings, it couldn't destroy Salford's spirit.

#Salford #Salford100 #Salfordhistory #hongkongers #ManchesterBlitz

Thank you for riding into the new year with us! This is how we celebrated the Year of the Horse with @salfordhongkongerscic @lorisleeliondance and @globalkids.world 🐎🔥

Lanterns, calligraphy, red packets giveaway, Mahjong tournament, pop-ups, and a lion dance that shook the room. Today was a full-on celebration of culture, community, and new beginnings. What was your favourite part of the day? Let us know in the comments ✨🧧

#yearofthehorse #kargomkt #manchester #community #salfordquays

Salford 100 Years - Day 14: 1939年

戰爭準備 / Preparing for War

1939年9月，當英國向德國宣戰時，索爾福德迅速進入戰時狀態。Anderson 防空洞被安裝在後院；空襲預防（ARP）志願者進行演習；家庭領取防毒面具。沙袋堆放在建築物外，黑幕窗簾遮蔽每一扇窗戶。

In September 1939, when Britain declared war on Germany, Salford quickly entered wartime mode. Anderson air raid shelters, ARP drills, gas masks, blackout curtains — the city prepared for what was to come.

#Salford #Salford100 #Salfordhistory #hongkongers #WWII
